welcome.title: How can I help?
welcome.text: Tell me what you'd like to do with your data — I'll update the flow for you automatically.

suggestions.formatPhone: Format all phone numbers to international
suggestions.whatCanYouDo: What can you help me with?

input.placeholder: Tell me what to do with your data...

responses.ssnNotFound: I couldn't find a "Social Security" column in your data. Should I skip this step, or would you like to map a different column to it?
responses.actionAdded:
Done! I've added a new **"{{label}}"** step to your flow. You should see it appear on the flowchart now.

Would you like to adjust its settings, or add another step?
responses.schedule:
**{{name}}** syncs on schedule: `{{cron}}`.

Last edited: {{lastEdited}}. Would you like to change the sync frequency?
responses.help:
I can help you:

- **Clean up data** — addresses, phone numbers, special characters
- **Remove duplicates** from your employee records
- **Mask sensitive data** like SSNs and emails
- **Standardise fields** — country codes, column names
- **Explain** each step in your flow

Just tell me what you need in plain English!
responses.error:
I noticed something might not be right. Let me check…

Your flow currently has **{{count}}** step(s). Could you describe what went wrong? For example:
- "I'm seeing the wrong column names"
- "Some records are missing"

I'll do my best to help!
responses.default:
I see your connection **{{name}}** has {{count}} step(s). Tell me what you'd like to change — for example:

• "Clean up my address data"
• "Remove duplicate records"
• "Format phone numbers to international"

I'll update the flow for you automatically!

connection.title: Connect Your HR System
connection.subtitle: Choose your HR platform and provide the connection details.
connection.displayNameHint: A friendly name to identify this connection.

workday.tenantUrlHint: Your Workday SOAP endpoint including the tenant path.
workday.responseGroupsHint: Select which data groups to pull from Workday.

csv.csvFilePathHint: Path to the CSV file that will be ingested by the pipeline.

empty.title: No connected systems found
empty.noData: Connect your first HR system to get started.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

validation.selectResponseGroup: At least one response group must be selected
